title: Received 429 Too Many Requests
rationale: HTTP 429 rate-limit from remote generation service. retryWithRateLimit now throws CliError(NetworkError) on exhaustion, and generateOne passes error object through failWithoutThrowing so resolveErrorCode propagates the code.
fixSummary: Change retryWithRateLimit exhaustion code from InternalError to NetworkError; pass error object in generateOne catch to failWithoutThrowing.
problemSignature: TooManyRequestsError from retryWithRateLimit reaching Sentry because failWithoutThrowing(message) lost the error object and code.
